title: indices.get_data_lifecycle

name.description:
Comma-separated list of data streams to limit the request.
Supports wildcards (`*`).
To target all data streams, omit this parameter or use `*` or `_all`.

expand_wildcards.description:
Type of data stream that wildcard patterns can match.
Supports comma-separated values, such as `open,hidden`.

include_defaults.description: If `true`, return all default settings in the response.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

description:
Get data stream lifecycles.

Get the data stream lifecycle configuration of one or more data streams.
